        window.openSearchPage = () => { openPageHelper('search-page'); document.getElementById('search-input').value = ''; document.getElementById('search-suggestions').innerHTML = ''; document.getElementById('search-results-list').innerHTML = ''; setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('search-input').focus(), 100); };
        window.handleSearchInput = () => {
            const query = document.getElementById('search-input').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const suggBox = document.getElementById('search-suggestions'); const resBox = document.getElementById('search-results-list');
            resBox.innerHTML = ''; if (query.length < 1) return suggBox.innerHTML = '';
            let matches =[];
            Object.keys(window.appCache).forEach(id => {
                const a = window.appCache[id];
                if(a.status !== 'approved') return;
                if ( (a.name && a.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) || (a.tags && a.tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(query))) || (a.appType && a.appType.toLowerCase().includes(query)) || (a.category && a.category.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ) matches.push(a);
            });
            if (matches.length === 0) suggBox.innerHTML = `<p style="text-align:center; padding:15px; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px;">No matching apps found.</p>`;
            else {
                let suggested = new Set(); matches.forEach(m => { if(suggested.size < 8 && m.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) suggested.add(m.name); });
                suggBox.innerHTML = Array.from(suggested).map(name => `<div class="suggestion-item" onclick="executeSearch('${name.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')"><i class="fas fa-search"></i> ${name}</div>`).join('');
                if(query === 'app' || query === 'game' || APP_CATEGORIES.some(c=>c.toLowerCase().includes(query)) || GAME_CATEGORIES.some(c=>c.toLowerCase().includes(query))) { suggBox.innerHTML += `<div class="suggestion-item" onclick="executeSearch('${query}')" style="color:var(--primary);"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> See all in "${query}"</div>`; }
            }
        };

        window.executeSearch = (searchStr) => {
            document.getElementById('search-input').value = searchStr; document.getElementById('search-suggestions').innerHTML = '';
            const resBox = document.getElementById('search-results-list'); const query = searchStr.toLowerCase(); let html = '';
            Object.keys(window.appCache).forEach(id => {
                const a = window.appCache[id];
                if(a.status !== 'approved') return;
                if ( (a.name && a.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) || (a.tags && a.tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(query))) || (a.appType && a.appType.toLowerCase().includes(query)) || (a.category && a.category.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ) {
                    html += `<div class="app-card" style="margin-top:0; margin-bottom:10px; min-height:85px;" ${evtBindings(id)}><img src="${a.icon}" class="app-icon"><div class="app-info"><h3>${a.name}</h3><p><i class="fas fa-user" style="font-size:10px;"></i> ${a.publisherName || 'User'}</p></div><i class="fas fa-chevron-right" style="margin-left:auto; color:var(--text-muted);"></i></div>`;
                }
            });
            resBox.innerHTML = html === '' ? `<p style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted);">No results found.</p>` : `<h3 style="margin-bottom:15px; font-size:16px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color); padding-bottom:10px; color: var(--white);">Search Results</h3>` + html;
        };

        window.switchTab = (tab) => { document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('home-section').style.display = tab === 'home' ? 'block' : 'none'; document.getElementById('profile-section').style.display = tab === 'profile' ? 'block' : 'none'; if(tab === 'home') document.querySelector('.nav-item:nth-child(1)').classList.add('active'); else { document.querySelector('.nav-item:nth-child(2)').classList.add('active'); if(!window.currentUser) document.getElementById('auth-fullscreen').style.display = 'flex'; } };
    </script>
</body>
</html>
